title: Compute Order and Refund Metrics in SQLite
summary: Aggregate order counts, paid revenue, and refunds for one reporting window in SQLite.
highlights: Counts order states in one query
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Python 3.9.6 and SQLite 3.51.0 on macOS. Verified behavior covers status counts, paid revenue, refunds filtered by refunded_at, empty windows, null amount handling, and start-inclusive end-exclusive filtering for created_at and refunded_at.
